records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Republished (-l?sht); p. pr. & vb. n. Republishing.]

defs: To publish anew; specifically, to publish in one country (a work first published in another); also, to revive (a will) by reexecution or codicil.
quotes: Subsecquent to the purchase or contract, the devisor republished his will.
